w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: Added Environment audit and Application update - Check APIs
New API added for App version fetch
Custom dynamic parameter details in bill number
Addition of Void, Refund, List and Settlement APIs
App Update API key name change
AES256 mechanism added for password token
ISO Error code and description added
Error code added for “Transaction canceled by user”
Data type changed to String to Avoid Confusion
The purpose of the document is to provide a technical reference to the development team to develop payment initiation with
App using an intent API mechanism for the android platform.
App is compiled for a target version: Android API version
to support the as per the PCI security guidelines.
With intent integration, partner app and
are completely segmented and partner has no compliance implication.
However, below are a few guidelines to be followed:
Maintain the confidentiality of the documentation, and integration kit and restrict the circulation to any external and internal stakeholder, who isn’t intended to use it.
Any breach of confidentiality should be reported to
encourages the structuring and following of the SDLC policy.
integration team for QA sign-off with respect to payment integration.
Payment application will be maintained compliance by
and partner to support, as required.
application is installed. If app is installed, it will invoke the app otherwise it will go to google play app install.
intent to generate the session key.
payment API with parameters like amount, mobile
application will give transaction result in response, post completing the transaction.
Below is the overview of the Intent integration API:
App for Login with the below attributes. On successful login, session id is created and provided in the response.
* Please note that it is mandatory to do a login API request before every transaction request.
Username assigned for the merchant user Password token generated using the shared
Algorithm and encrypted under the public key
Partner Id assigned for the merchant user
generate the password token following the
Generate the Hash of Pin using the SHA256 algorithm as Component 1
Generate the hash of Username using SHA256 algorithm as Component 2
1 and Component 2 to generate the Password token.
Password token generated will now be sent encrypted under the AES256 key shared by
concatenated with Initial Vector used for encryption.
to implement the mechanism or provide a separate AAR package which would offline generate the encrypted password tokens using the input as PIN, username, public key
Below are the API details with the request parameters for the initiation of App environment precheck, if
to perform without initiating the payment transaction.
Please refer to the error code and the description from section #5
to continue with the transaction, the error code mentioned below will be sent. SPOCT00/CPOCT00: Success, No issue with the setup.
Below are the API details with the request parameters for the initiation of Payment transaction.
Note: Any value other than 00 or 0 in the
, is a failure of the transaction. Failure description will be provided in
Below are the API details with the request parameters for the previous transactions.
To retrieve success or all transactions 0 - All transactions
Below are the API details with the request parameters for the initiation of void transaction. Void can only be initiated for the transactions within the current batch.
Below are the API details with the request parameters for the initiation of Refund transaction.
User mobile number to send transaction receipt No
Transaction Id of the previous transaction
Note: Any value other than 00 or 0 in the
, is a failure of the transaction. Failure description will be provided in
Below are the API details with the request parameters for the initiation of Refund transaction.
User mobile number to send transaction receipt No
Transaction Id of the previous transaction
Note: Any value other than 00 or 0 in the
, is a failure of the transaction. Failure description will be provided in
Below are the API details with the request parameters for the initiation of void transaction. Void can only be initiated for the transactions within the current batch.
Unique session id is given by the
Below are the API details with the request parameters for the initiation of batch Settlement.
A Json format string as mentioned below will be provided in the response under
exists additional parameters in addition to the
which may not be in the
and the description for the environment responses expected sent in
. These codes represent the state and condition of the device environment.
Response code 0 is success, where in the environment validation is meeting the required conditions and the transaction will continue further.
Transaction response and the receipt format are explained above.
0: Success, No issue with the setup.
SPOCT01/CPOCT01: Device Rooted : Change the device and use an unrooted device/mobile SPOCT02/CPOCT02: Secure Mode: Change the device and use an unrooted device/mobile SPOCT03/CPOCT03:
Enforcing : Change the device and use an unrooted device/mobile SPOCT04/CPOCT04:

Enabled: Turn off the developer mode from device settings SPOCT05/CPOCT05: Super User Exist: Change the device, use unrooted device/mobile SPOCT06/CPOCT06: Emulator: Don’t use emulator. use a physical device/mobile SPOCT07/CPOCT07: Accessibility Enabled: Turn accessibility off from device settings SPOCT08/CPOCT08: Talk Back Enabled: Turn
off from device settings SPOCT09/CPOCT09: Remote Screen Sharing: Turn off screen sharing tool
SPOCT10/CPOCT10: Mic is ON: Turn off mic and/or apps running behind while using the mic SPOCT11/CPOCT11: Camera Enabled: Turn off camera app and/or apps running behind while using the camera
SPOCB01/CPOCB01: Application is side loaded (System baseline Error code
Download app from google play store
SPOCB03/CPOCB03: Android Version not supported (System baseline Error code): Use Android 8 or above
SPOCB04/CPOCB04: Firmware not updated (System baseline Error code
latest firmware SPOCB05/CPOCB05: Permissions not granted.
SPOCB06/CPOCB06: Input Parameters missing SPOCB07/CPOCB07: Provisioning Failed. Please
health check. SPOCB08/CPOCB08: Enablement Failed. Please
health check. SPOCB09/CPOCB09: System Message for Signing Failure.
SPOCB11/CPOCB11: Automate to perform a login and redo API call SPOCB12/CPOCB12: Transaction Timeout. Reversal will be initiated SPOCB13/CPOCB13: Change password request. Configuration Error.
Please note that in case of login session expiry or payment call without
the error code: 99. Automate to perform a login and redo the payment API call.
Refer to card issuers special conditions
File update not supported by receiver (only in 03xx)
Unable to locate record on file (only in 03xx)
Duplicate file update record, no action (only in 03xx)
File update field edit error (only in 03xx)
File update record locked out (only in 03xx)
File update not successful, contact acquirer (only in 03xx)
Transaction not permitted to terminal (may also be a chargeback)
Security violation (may also be a chargeback)
Allowable number of PIN tries exceeded
Customer not eligible for POS (Star SM)
Count exceeds limit — not relevant to MPQR
Time limit for pre-authorization reached — not relevant to MPQR
Issuer has no reason to decline the transaction (Account Verification)
Cannot verify PIN — not relevant to MPQR
Card verification value (CVV) verification failed (no pickup)
Financial institution or intermediate network unknown for routing
Transaction cannot be completed, violation of law
Below are the API details to
if there is an update of the app is available in the
Additional data like QR metadata is sent in a bill number using colon as separator (“:”). If no, additional parameters, apart from the description in the Payment request: "
If additional parameters are sent either in the app or by the host. In this case, Paytm host will send the QR
) which will be packed in the
, as referred in the example below:
This parameter is available in both the Payment and receipt response.
What is the duration of login session.
being an intent app. It will be available in the background and will be only
when the payment activity is necessary
is highly advised to perform a login before any activity. However, Environment audit check API can be called with or without login activity.
How we can get the partner ID which is mentioned in the login part.
We will be sharing the partner ID, key and the common PIN
Where can I send my order id.
You can use the description parameter to send the order id.
All these permissions seem to be mandatory for integration to work,
Camera - To avoid capturing the card while tapping behind the camera
Files and media - for application logs
Phone - To see if there is an active call at the time of the transaction. This is a PCI requirement
Microphone - to avoid understanding the activity in progress. Google Android is having accessibility capable to support the special disabled. This is applicable in the case of Phone
, it is required to understand the location operation, as per the PCI, and acquiring guidelines
Data is checked before performing every transaction and will not be stored. However, location collected is stored and tagged along with the transaction
How do I check whether the mobile is compliant with security requirements
activity defined under Section 2 i.e. Environment audit check
We are getting error – System Message For signing failure
first then do a health checkup.
Is apple Pay and Google pay
be tested in the test environment, as test setup cannot identify the token generated.
Regarding the transaction receipt. Is there a regulation about it that it
be printed by default, upon request or what.
which is called as Tap n go. It is not mandatory. However, if customer needs it then it
be provided in some form i.e. receipt.
Regarding the username and password. Can we prompt the user to enter them from our application directly and persist them in DB for future use.
You may either map the username with your application user credentials in a
mapping or ask the user to enter the username.
However, password is an enterprise salt PIN and can be maintained in the backend. Random
generated with the mechanism shared and sent in login activity.
We are getting EMV offline declined error while using a credit card that we have.
We may get EMV offline declined error for few
in test environment as these BIN not available in test environment, please try with the other card.
There is indefinite number of Intent being invoked, we have inspected, the lock being fired when an intent comes and keeps it executing endlessly.
Intent is not implemented properly, please check once again.
Can we implement the batch settlement functionality.
supports both manual and auto settlement. However, the settlement type is based on the acquiring partner.
team will guide you whether you can integrate the batch settlement or not needed.
In the payment transaction response, you will get it under
in JSON format, you can refer
Is it mandatory to Print Merchant Receipt and Customer Receipt?
You can provide an option to print a receipt if asked by customer.
Do we need to do the scheme certifications.
Please check with your acquiring partner. You can also reach out to our Project management team for additional help on SPOC assigned to you
Is the solution compliant to PCI standards.
and scheme certifications for Tap on Phone with PIN from Visa, Mastercard & Amex.
is currently in draft mode. Expected release of PCI
While we ensure that there is no impact on the API Interface level. If any as such, we only expect that these will be minimal.
